nasb.text: But they did not listen, and Manasseh seduced them to do evil more than the nations whom the Lord destroyed before the sons of Israel.

esv.text: But they did not listen, and Manasseh led them astray to do more evil than the nations had done whom the Lord destroyed before the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 但是他們沒有聽從。瑪拿西引誘他們去作壞事，比耶和華從以色列人面前消滅的外族人更厲害。

ccb.text: 可是以色列人不肯听从。玛拿西诱使他们作恶，比耶和华在以色列人面前所毁灭的各族更严重。
